nav.sub: Privacy layer for your AI agent

hero.title1: Every skill you install can see everything you do
hero.desc: Mapick is a personal skill advisor with a built-in privacy layer for your OpenClaw agent. It recommends the AI skills you actually need, cleans what you don't use, and blocks what's unsafe.
hero.small: 30-second install · Works in any language · Free

problem.title: You probably have all three of these issues right now.

cards.title: 40 skills = 40 pairs of eyes
cards.body: Every skill runs inside your conversation context. They legitimately read your chat history, code, API keys, and work content. Security scanning can't help: the code isn't malicious, the permissions are normal. You just don't have a privacy layer.

cards.title: You're wasting hours every week
cards.body: You're missing 3 critical skills that would automate what you're doing manually. Not what's trending — what fits your actual workflow. You won't find them by browsing ClawHub's 59,300 skills.

cards.title: Half your skills are dead weight
cards.body: You followed a tutorial, installed 40 skills, and 19 of them have never been used. They bloat your context window every session and slow your agent down.

blocks.caption: First conversation: tell Mapick what you do, it tells you what can be automated

lines.text: I write code, review PRs, check CI
Scanning your installed skills against that workflow…
Detected 3 efficiency gaps. Reply 1 to install all.

blocks.caption: 19 zombies found — 40% context reduction after cleanup
Your developer persona: 1,847 calls this month, peak hours 23:00–03:00

items.name: Privacy protection
items.headline: Your data gets redacted before it leaves your machine.
items.body: The redaction engine (open source: scripts/redact.py) strips API keys, SSH keys, JWT tokens, database connection strings, personal IDs, and 20+ other secret patterns before any data is transmitted. Only anonymized skill IDs and timestamps leave your device.
demo: Data sent: skill IDs + timestamps only

items.name: Smart recommendations
items.headline: Matched to your workflow, not a popularity list.
items.body: Tell Mapick what you do (write code, review PRs, check CI, read logs) and it scans your installed skills against your workflow. Recommendations show why you need each skill, not just what it does. C-grade skills never appear.
demo: 82% of power GitHub users install this

items.name: Zombie cleanup
items.headline: Find and remove skills you never use.
items.body: Mapick scans your installed skills and flags anything with zero calls or 30+ days idle, and tells you which ones were probably installed from a tutorial and never touched. Cleaning 19 zombies typically cuts your context window by 40%.

items.name: Security scoring
items.headline: Every skill gets a grade before you install it.
items.body: Four-dimension scoring: code scan (40%), permission consistency (25%), community signals (20%), VirusTotal integration (15%). A = safe. B = warning. C = blocked with alternatives shown. Also detects typosquatting — the ClawHavoc attack pattern.

items.name: Developer persona
items.headline: 13 persona types. Based on what you actually do.
items.body: Mapick analyzes your usage data (which skills you use, how often, what time of day, how long your sessions run) and matches you to a developer persona. Shareable as a card with OG tags. Preview directly in WeChat, Twitter/X, Telegram.

items.name: Skill bundles
items.headline: One command to install an entire toolchain.
items.body: 11 pre-built bundles matched to your persona. Shows which skills you already have and how many you're missing. Reply to install all at once.

persona.title: What's your OpenClaw persona?
persona.body: Mapick turns your recommendations, your usage data, and your decisions into a shareable skill card.
persona.name: 3AM Committer
persona.taunt: Debugging at 3AM. Committing code with dark circles under your eyes.

bundles.title: Copy a proven stack.
bundles.body: Pre-built bundles, ranked by fit. Reply with a number to install all at once.

items.name: Full-Stack Developer
items.stack: github · docker-manage · code-review · ci-monitor · log-analyzer · db-helper · api-tester

items.name: Data Analyst
items.stack: notebook · search · charts · report-builder · sql-helper · data-clean · summarize · export · scheduler

bundles.list: Full-Stack Developer · Content Creator · DevOps · Data Analyst · Deep Research · Security Audit · Second Brain · Workflow Automation · Google Workspace · Multi-Platform Comms · pnpm Monorepo

trust.title: Open source. Auditable. Your data, your control.
trust.body: Every line running on your machine is inspectable, from the scripts to the redaction rules.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.body: Everything on your machine is MIT-licensed. Read every rule, verify every command, audit every AI instruction.
openSource.verifyCmd:
# verify yourself
$ git clone https://github.com/mapick-ai/mapick
$ cat scripts/redact.py | head -40

footer.title: Add a privacy layer to your AI agent.
